creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #12)

Yes, I can confirm that the bug is still relevant with Gnome 3.18 from "latest" 11.1Release repo.

The only way to start gnome-terminal still is 'dbus-launch gnome-terminal' if not running Gnome itself (I use FVWM).
